Cinematic 8-second vertical video, ultra-realistic, 4K.
Shot 1 (0-3 seconds):
Close-up portrait of a beautiful young Chinese woman in elegant white and black Hanfu. She stands gracefully in a misty ancient landscape with soft fog and god rays. The camera slowly orbits around her from left to right while gently zooming in. Her long black hair and sheer Hanfu fabric flow softly in the breeze. She starts with a serene, slightly shy expression, looking gently at the camera. She slowly tilts her head slightly to the side, her long eyelashes blink once, and the corners of her mouth curve into a faint, warm, elegant smile. Delicate white hair ornaments and teardrop earrings sway lightly.
Shot 2 (3-6 seconds):
Smooth transition with a slow dissolve. The camera pulls back to a medium shot as she gracefully turns her body 45 degrees to the right, away from the camera. Her long hair and wide sleeves flow dramatically with the turn. She lowers her gaze for a moment, then slowly raises her head and looks back over her shoulder toward the camera with soft, captivating eyes. Gentle mist swirls around her, and soft light particles drift in the air.
Shot 3 (6-8 seconds):
The camera slowly zooms in again on her face as she fully turns back toward the camera. She gives a final gentle, almost shy smile, her eyes sparkling softly. Her hair continues to flow elegantly in the wind. The scene fades out with increasing mist and glowing light.
Overall mood: graceful, poetic, ethereal, and breathtakingly beautiful. Soft breeze, flowing fabric and hair, smooth natural movements, cinematic lighting with rim light and god rays, high detail, masterpiece quality.
